name: Human Cattle Farm
description:
(optional futa) A hucow farm? In the monster realm? What could go wrong?

Be anything you want, just know, men aren't too common in this world. Wink, wink. Make sure to keep an eye out for the boss lady, too.

"Be sure to ask our helpful staff about our lovely faculties designed to keep you spending your hard earned gold! I mean...uh...keep you satisfied! And no, you aren't allowed to bang my staff." - Alice Maroth, Owner of the Zarothian Cattle Farm.
creator: NANANA221
